articles.title: Colocation data centers: The infrastructure race behind AI

articles.title: Nuclear power: A renaissance in the making
articles.summary: The explosion of AI data centers and the continued electrification of automobiles and other products have greatly increased demand for electricity, sparking renewed interest in producing nuclear power.
